headline: SEC Eyes $1B Crypto ETF Market Amid Rule Review

headline: Hyperliquid ETFs Surge 50% in Crypto Trading Volume

article.title: Hyperliquid ETFs surprise with 50% volume jump after slow launch
article.summary: ETF analyst Eric Balchunas says crypto and traditional assets are trading down while Hyperliquid is up, leading to a boon for ETFs tied to the token.

article.title: Indian Rupee Rises Most in Asia on Central Bank Intervention
article.summary: India’s rupee advanced the most in Asia after the central bank intervened and as policymakers are said to be considering options, including an interest-rate hike, to defend the currency.

headline: Dimon Warns of 5% Yield Amid Inflation Fears

article.title: Jamie Dimon on Bond Market, Inflation and Equities
article.summary: CEO of JPMorgan Chase Jamie Dimon speaks exclusively with Bloomberg's Haslinda Amin about the rout in bond markets, the risk of heightened inflation, and why corporate earnings remain so high. (Source: Bloomberg)
